title: Examples of protocols on protocols.io from different disciplines
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"e7q2","text":"We warmly welcome all research methods. While the origin of the platform was more biology/wetlab, we expanded to support all fields when we partnered with PLOS ONE in 2017.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"akrh7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9bb2a","text":"There is now a diverse spectrum of research methods that are shared on protocols.io, including molecular biology, computational, human, medical, psychology, geosciences, political science, and other. We also have many guidelines, best practices, and teaching documents on protocols.io - all of these are appropriate.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":71,"length":12},{"key":1,"offset":272,"length":12}],"data":{}},{"key":"5i991","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9obfv","text":"Below you will find some recent examples from different disciplines. Please note that this is just a subset from over 26,000 public protocols on the platform. For different examples over the years, view previous versions of the protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"CA1EF0AA176311EDBAEC0A58A9FEAC02","url":"http://protocols.io"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"CA1EF0FC176311EDBAEC0A58A9FEAC02","url":"http://protocols.io"}}}}
